# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    S = data[1]

    seen = set()
    i = 0
    while i < N:
        j = i
        while j < N and S[j] == S[i]:
            j += 1
        length = j - i
        for k in range(1, length + 1):
            seen.add(S[i] * k)
        i = j

    print(len(seen))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
